title: Aspect Disposable Dehumidifier for Home 500ml, Moisture Absorber Dehumidifiers for Damp, Mould, Kitchen, Wardrobe, Bedroom, Caravan,Office,Garage, Bathroom - Mini Condensation Absorbers-Pack of 20
features: DEHUMIDIFIERS CAPACITY : 500ml moisture absorber effectively removes excess moisture and condensation from indoor spaces to help prevent damp and mould growth
MULTI-PURPOSE DEHUMIDIFIER : Suitable for multiple locations including kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, wardrobe, office, garage, and caravan spaces
MOVEABLE AND SPACE-SAVING : Compact and lightweight unit can be easily moved between rooms or spaces as needed
MOISTURE ABSORBER : Helps maintain optimal humidity levels in your living spaces for improved comfort and air quality
QUICK AND SIMPLE TO USE DEHUMIDIFIERS : No electricity required - works through moisture absorption technology for hassle-free dehumidification
